steps.title: Identify the need for a possessive
steps.content: The blank must show that the borders belong to the Tang dynasty. The phrase “within ______” requires a noun phrase expressing possession.

steps.title: Apply the possessive pronoun rule
steps.content: Use the possessive pronoun “its” (not the contraction “it's”) to show possession. “Its borders” is the standard form. C and D violate the rule with the contraction “it's”; B uses the singular possessive “border's,” but the standard form uses the plural “borders.” That matches choice A — A is correct.
